---
title: "EasyDE Walkthrough — 01 Validate Inputs"
output: html_document
---

# Step 01: Validate Config & Contrasts

This step runs **once per config**. It checks:
- All required columns exist in the contrasts CSV
- Each contrast has matching samples in the metadata
- Count matrix files exist for every listed stratum
- No duplicate contrast IDs

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
pipeline_root <- normalizePath("../..")
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = pipeline_root)
setwd(pipeline_root)

config_path <- "config/config_treatments.yaml"   # EDIT THIS

suppressMessages({
    library(yaml); library(data.table); library(dplyr); library(stringr)
})
for (f in list.files("workflow/scripts/utils", pattern = "\\.R$", full.names = TRUE)) source(f)
```

## Load config

```{r load-config}
config_data  <- load_config(config_path)
cfg          <- config_data$cfg
contrasts_df <- config_data$contrasts_df
```

## Validate each contrast

```{r validate-contrasts}
required_cols <- c("contrast_id", "contrast_var", "biosample_id_col",
                   "control_grp", "experimental_grp", "strata")
missing_cols  <- setdiff(required_cols, colnames(contrasts_df))
if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Missing required columns in contrasts CSV: ",
         paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
}
cat("✓ All required columns present\n\n")

# Check for duplicate contrast IDs
dup_ids <- contrasts_df$contrast_id[duplicated(contrasts_df$contrast_id)]
if (length(dup_ids) > 0) {
    stop("Duplicate contrast IDs: ", paste(dup_ids, collapse = ", "))
}
cat("✓ No duplicate contrast IDs\n\n")

# Load metadata once
sample_metadata <- fread(cfg$inputs$metadata_file) %>% as.data.frame()
cat(sprintf("Sample metadata: %d rows × %d columns\n\n",
            nrow(sample_metadata), ncol(sample_metadata)))

for (i in seq_len(nrow(contrasts_df))) {
    row <- contrasts_df[i, ]
    cat(sprintf("━━ %s ━━\n", row$contrast_id))

    # Check that the contrast variable column exists in metadata
    if (!row$contrast_var %in% colnames(sample_metadata)) {
        cat(sprintf("  ✗ contrast_var '%s' not found in metadata\n", row$contrast_var))
        next
    }
    cat(sprintf("  contrast_var: %s\n", row$contrast_var))

    # Check groups
    group_vals <- unique(sample_metadata[[row$contrast_var]])
    is_categorical <- !is.na(row$control_grp) && row$control_grp != ""

    if (is_categorical) {
        if (!row$control_grp %in% group_vals)
            cat(sprintf("  ⚠ control_grp '%s' not found in data\n", row$control_grp))
        if (!row$experimental_grp %in% group_vals)
            cat(sprintf("  ⚠ experimental_grp '%s' not found in data\n", row$experimental_grp))
        cat(sprintf("  contrast: %s vs %s\n", row$experimental_grp, row$control_grp))
    } else {
        cat("  continuous variable\n")
    }

    # Check count files for each stratum
    strata <- parse_pipe_field(row$strata)
    for (stm in strata) {
        stm_safe <- sanitize_names(stm)
        counts_path <- file.path(cfg$inputs$counts_dir,
                                 paste0(stm_safe, ".counts.csv"))
        exists_flag <- if (file.exists(counts_path)) "✓" else "✗"
        cat(sprintf("  %s %s → %s\n", exists_flag, stm, basename(counts_path)))
    }
    cat("\n")
}
```

## Mark validation complete

```{r done-sentinel}
done_dir <- cfg$outputs$logs_dir
dir.create(done_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
done_path <- file.path(done_dir, "01_validate.done")
writeLines(as.character(Sys.time()), done_path)
cat(sprintf("✓ Validation complete — sentinel: %s\n", done_path))
```
